name: BridgeLLM
desc: An MCP server for agent-to-agent communication. Backend and frontend agents share API contracts, query each other in real time, and stay in sync across services without you being the middleman.

name: Deploy Checklist Bot
desc: A GitHub App that reads your PR diff, figures out what could go wrong at deploy time, and blocks the merge until every item is signed off. Catches missed migrations, undeclared env vars, and breaking API changes before they hit prod.

name: Shellock
desc: A shell autocorrect tool built on a hybrid preexec/trap ERR architecture. It captures failed commands, runs fuzzy matching against your history, and suggests a fix with zero overhead on commands that succeed.

name: PATRA
desc: An open-source digital card generator for students and professionals. Easily create and share personalized digital cards with a unique public ID.

name: 4D_VECTOR_CLI
desc: A versatile CLI tool for translation, summarization, and code snippet generation using Bash, Python, and OpenAI APIs.
